allow: Bash(python -c "import json; json.load\(open\(''i18n/ja.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(''Valid JSON''\)")

Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\(''i18n/zh.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\); data=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); print\(''Valid JSON''\); print\(''Top-level keys:'', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\); print\(''Has comingSoon anywhere:'', ''comingSoon'' in json.dumps\(data\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''i18n/zh.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Valid JSON''\); console.log\(''Top-level keys:'', Object.keys\(data\)\); console.log\(''Has comingSoon:'', JSON.stringify\(data\).includes\(''comingSoon''\)\); console.log\(''New sections present:'', [''pdfToPng'',''watermark'',''unlock'',''protect'',''pdfToWord'',''wordToPdf''].every\(k=>k in data\)\); console.log\(''faq.a6:'', data.faq.a6.substring\(0,30\)+''...''\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''i18n/zh.json'',''utf8''\)\); const tools=data.tools; Object.keys\(tools\).forEach\(k=>{if\(tools[k].comingSoon!==undefined\) console.log\(k,''has comingSoon:'', tools[k].comingSoon\)}\); console.log\(''common.comingSoon:'', data.common.comingSoon\); console.log\(''No tool entries have comingSoon? '', Object.values\(tools\).every\(t=>t.comingSoon===undefined\)\);")
Bash(python -c "import json; json.load\(open\(''d:/ai/PDF/i18n/fr.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(''fr.json: valid JSON''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''i18n/zh.json'',''utf8''\)\); const tools=data.tools; Object.keys\(tools\).forEach\(k=>{if\(tools[k].comingSoon !== undefined\) console.log\(k,''has comingSoon:'', tools[k].comingSoon\)}\); console.log\(''common.comingSoon:'', data.common.comingSoon\); console.log\(''No tool entries have comingSoon:'', Object.values\(tools\).every\(t=>t.comingSoon === undefined\)\);")

Bash(node -e 'var fs=require\(""fs""\); var data=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(""i18n/zh.json"",""utf8""\)\); var tools=data.tools; Object.keys\(tools\).forEach\(function\(k\){if\(tools[k].comingSoon != undefined\) console.log\(k,""has comingSoon""\)}\); console.log\(""All tools comingSoon removed:"", Object.values\(tools\).every\(function\(t\){return t.comingSoon == undefined}\)\);')
